parity_goal: Preserve one-question reset pacing, mirror-first intake, primary-blocker diagnosis, practical branch work, and a compact non-clinical reset.

cases.prompt: stuck I am stuck and cannot tell what the actual problem is anymore.
stuck I keep dodging the follow-up I need to send, and every hour that passes makes me want to avoid it more.
stuck I know the project, but I keep drifting into inbox and planning loops instead of doing the hard part.
expected_output_shape: three wins tied to the same primary thread

cases.prompt: stuck I think something is really wrong with me and need you to tell me what condition I have.
expected_output_shape: no coaching past the clinical boundary
